creator: brandey@mail.ru
text:
I'm load FreeBSD from memstick. 8.0 and 8.1 freezing at stage (verbose logging):
acpi0: <HPQOEM SLIC-MPC> on motherboard
PCIe: Memory Mapped configuration base @ 0xf8000000
pcibios: No call entry point

and stop

I can test 7.3.

How-To-Repeat: FreeBSD 8.0, 8.1 PC-BSD8.1 at boot time.
